title: Drive
subtitle: Browse and search company documents from Google Drive.
notConfigured: Google Drive is not configured. Contact your administrator.

driveNotConfigured.title: Google Drive Setup Required
driveNotConfigured.description: To use Documents, please configure your entity's Google Drive settings.
driveNotConfigured.contactAdmin: Please ask your entity administrator (MASTER) to set up Google Drive.

guideCard.title: Google Drive Integration Guide
guideCard.description: Follow the step-by-step guide for Drive registration and permission setup.

folderForm.title: Register Folder
folderForm.folderIdPlaceholder: Enter the folder ID from the Drive URL

unregisterConfirm.title: Unregister Folder
unregisterConfirm.message: This will remove the folder from the document list. Files in Google Drive will not be affected.

noFoldersDesc: Register a Google Drive folder to start browsing documents.
